# bowtie_device_group (Resource)

A named group of devices. Device groups are referenced by policy sources (`device_group`) to grant or deny access based on device membership rather than per-device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "bowtie_device_group" "corporate_laptops" {
  name        = "Corporate Laptops"
  description = "Company-owned laptops eligible for privileged access."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The human readable name of the device group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description of the device group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal device group ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import bowtie_device_group.corporate_laptops 47480e17-e7a2-4f7d-a0c0-3db8fd86c4ff
```
